project_type: TypeScript monorepo (pnpm workspaces + turborepo) with multiple app backends using Fastify
build_system: pnpm@10.28.1 with turbo for task orchestration. Apps are workspace packages under apps/
test_framework: Vitest with globals: true, environment: node. Tests in backend/__tests__/*.test.ts per app.
verification_instructions: 1. Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run from repo root. 2. All tests must pass including new ones.
setup_instructions: pnpm install at repo root (already done)
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install npm packages. Node >=22.0.0, TypeScript ~5.5.0, Vitest ^2.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict mode. Services use dependency injection via constructor (PrismaClient interfaces defined locally). AI services accept AIEngine from @quant/ai. Routes use Fastify with zod validation. Each service has its own .test.ts file using vi.fn() mocks.
key_patterns: 1. Each app has: package.json, tsconfig.json, tsconfig.backend.json, vitest.config.ts, backend/app.ts, backend/routes/*.ts, backend/services/*.service.ts, backend/__tests__/*.test.ts. 2. Services define their own PrismaClient interface for DI. 3. AI services take AIEngine and PrismaClient in constructor, use this.ai.infer() with structured prompts. 4. Routes get prisma/ai from fastify instance, instantiate services per request. 5. Tests use createMockPrisma() and mock AI engines. 6. Error handling uses createAppError(message, statusCode, code) from @quant/server-core. 7. QuantApp type in packages/common/src/types.ts must include new app name.
directory_structure: Root: package.json, turbo.json, vitest.config.ts, tsconfig.json, pnpm-workspace.yaml. apps/: each app is its own workspace package. packages/: shared libs (common, auth, ai, server-core, database, realtime, shared-ui, etc). services/: standalone backend services.
